aliases.note: ABA2 is an ABA biosynthesis enzyme; no ABA2 node in KB, mapping to ABA (the hormone it produces) as the closest functional analog.
G-protein beta subunit AGB1 not present in KB; no family-level or mechanism node available.
G-protein gamma subunit AGG3 not present in KB; no family-level or mechanism node available.
Cytokinin signaling phosphotransfer protein AHP6 not in KB; no AHP family node present.
BR-signaling kinase BIN2 not in KB; BZR1/BRI1 present but represent different nodes in the BR pathway, not suitable proxies for BIN2.
ATBPC1 is the Arabidopsis locus prefix form of BPC1 (BASIC PENTACYSTEINE 1).
CKX3 not in KB; mapped to sibling family member CKX2 (both cytokinin oxidase/dehydrogenases with overlapping function in reproductive development).
CKX5 not in KB; mapped to sibling family member CKX2 (CKX family cytokinin oxidases).
No Cytokinin hormone node in KB; CKX2 (cytokinin oxidase) is present but represents degradation enzyme, not the hormone pool for exogenous supply.
DELLA is the GA-signaling repressor family; GAI (GA-INSENSITIVE) is the prototypical DELLA protein and is present in KB.
DWF4 (CYP90B1) is the rate-limiting BR biosynthesis enzyme; no DWF4 node in KB, mapping to Brassinosteroid hormone it produces.
FIE is a core component of the FIS-PRC2 Polycomb complex regulating seed development.
FIS2 is a core component of the FIS-PRC2 Polycomb complex (FIS class gene).
AN3 (ANGUSTIFOLIA3) is the Arabidopsis GIF1 ortholog/synonym (GRF-INTERACTING FACTOR 1 = AN3).
G-protein alpha subunit GPA1 not present in KB.
GRF family (Growth-Regulating Factor) not present as generic node; BNGRF2A (Brassica napus GRF2a) is the only GRF-family member in KB.
Gibberellin is the generic hormone name; GA is the canonical abbreviation present in KB.
KLUH is the full gene name of KLU (CYP78A5); same gene, alternative spelling.
ATLEC1 is the AT-prefixed Arabidopsis locus form of LEC1 (LEAFY COTYLEDON 1).
ATLEC2 is the AT-prefixed Arabidopsis locus form of LEC2 (LEAFY COTYLEDON 2).
MEA is the standard abbreviation of MEDEA (same gene).
MSI1 is a core component of the FIS-PRC2 Polycomb complex.
PICKLE (PKL) is a CHD3-type chromatin remodeling ATPase; CHD3 in KB represents this family/mechanism.
ATRAV1 is the AT-prefixed Arabidopsis locus form of RAV1.
SEEDSTICK (STK) is AGL11 (same gene, alternative name).
SEUSS abbreviated as SUS in KB (transcriptional co-regulator).
TAR1 (TAA1-RELATED 1) is an auxin biosynthesis enzyme; no TAR/TAA node in KB, mapping to IAA (auxin product).
TCP14 not present in KB; TASPL16 and PCF10SRDX are unrelated TCP-like entries but not TCP14 orthologs.
VAL1 (VP1/ABI3-LIKE 1) not present in KB; no VAL family node available.
VAL2 not present in KB; no VAL family node available.
YUC10 not in KB; mapped to sibling family member YUC4 (YUCCA family auxin biosynthesis flavin monooxygenases).
YUC11 not in KB; mapped to sibling family member YUC4 (YUCCA family auxin biosynthesis).
miR396 not in KB; MIR159 is the only plant microRNA family node available (miRNA family-level mapping).
